---
title: Patterns
description: Common implementation patterns for distributed systems
---

## Reusable patterns

Learn common patterns for building reliable distributed systems with Restate. These patterns solve recurring problems in distributed applications.

**Sagas** - Handle failures in multi-step processes by rolling back completed steps  
**Fan-out/Fan-in** - Process multiple items in parallel and collect results  
**Scheduled Tasks** - Replace cron with reliable, distributed task scheduling
